dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION Adults: Recommended starting dose is 100 mg at bedtime, with weekly increases of 50 mg as tolerated to maximum effect, not to exceed 300 mg/day ( 2.1 ) . Pediatric patients naïve to fluvoxamine maleate: The lowest available dose of fluvoxamine maleate extended-release capsules may not be appropriate ( 2.2 ) . Hepatically impaired: Decreased clearance may require modified dose and titration ( 2.3 ) . Extended treatment: Adjust dose to maintain lowest effective dose; re
